action.description:
Introduced by Senators Smith, Spreitzer, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Hesselbein, Keyeski, Larson, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Roys and Wirch; 
cosponsored by Representatives Hong, Tenorio, Andraca, Anderson, Arney, Bare, Billings, Brown, Clancy, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Doyle, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Haywood, Hysell, J.
